headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -18.8)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 44% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 132 quotes and a striking 99 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting forcefully today.
• The frustration score of 29.0 sits in the lower third of its 156-day range, so while the mood is heated, it is far from the peak levels this dashboard has seen.
• Fears dipped further into negative territory from yesterday, and Optimism edged up slightly, though both remain below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
